briefdescription.para: Not to configure Dst DMA at this address in AES.
Sources to be selected to configure secure stream switch.
This function is not applicable for versal.

detaileddescription.para: This function updates the crypto indicator bit of AES, SHA and ECC.

parameterdescription.para: To set or clear the bit
To set or clear the bit.

briefdescription.para: This function is not applicable for versal.

detaileddescription.para: This function updates RSA crypto indicator.

briefdescription.para: This file contains versal specific code for xilsecure server.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
5.0 bm 07/06/22 Initial release 5.2 yog 07/10/23 Added support of unaligned data sizes for Versal Net yog 09/04/23 Removed XSecure_ECCRandInit API definition 5.3 vss 10/12/23 Removed XSECURE_SSS_IGNORE to fix MISRA-C Rule 18.1 violation and OVER_RUN coverity warning 5.4 yog 04/29/24 Fixed doxygen grouping and doxygen warnings.
